message:
fix(mcp): harden stdio client — size cap, stderr drain, defensive copy, warn on malformed (#7986)

- #7959: cap stdout line size at mcpMaxResponseBytes (1 MiB) via bufio.Scanner;
  previously ReadBytes('\n') was unbounded and a buggy/malicious child could
  OOM the parent by never writing '\n'.
- #7960: drain stderr on a dedicated goroutine so the child doesn't stall
  once the 64 KiB pipe buffer fills; lines are forwarded to slog.Debug so
  diagnostics are preserved.
- #7974: Tools() now returns a defensive copy so callers cannot mutate
  internal state under the refresh goroutine.
- #7975: malformed JSON lines now log slog.Warn with a bounded prefix
  instead of silently continuing — makes broken plugins diagnosable.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
